mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy the preconfigured Snort IPS inline between the FortiGate (LAN-facing) and the internal switch so Snort can automatically detect and block ICMP flood patterns originating from the compromised host.

Configure FortiGate DoS protections and ICMP policing: create per-source and global ICMP rate-limits, enable control-plane protection and ICMP throttling so a single internal host cannot generate unlimited ICMP traffic or exhaust firewall resources.

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer-host"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block-icmp-from-ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end

show firewall policy
show firewall address

config firewall policy
move 2 1
end

show firewall policy

config firewall policy
delete 1
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block-icmp-from-ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set nat enable
next
end

show firewall policy
show firewall address

config firewall policy
delete 2
delete 3
delete 4
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block-icmp-from-ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-host"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
edit 0
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set nat enable
next
end

show firewall policy
show firewall address

config firewall policy
edit 1
set action deny
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
set status enable
next
end

show firewall policy
show firewall address
